note: Apex Freight Solutions Inc. is the successor entity to FleetLink Logistics Network. The rebrand was completed effective 1 April 2025. This report is the first issued under the Apex Freight Solutions Inc. corporate name. Per footnote (1), all historical metrics referenced in the document relate to the same operating business.

Per footnote (2), Recognized Revenue (transaction) and SaaS Tool Fee Revenue are disclosed separately for the first time in Q2 2025. Total Recognized Revenue (9.3M) is the sum of both lines and was selected as the canonical recognized_revenue value. Contribution Margin per Shipment ($2.30) is discussed in commentary only and not tabled — not a canonical metric in scope.

No rebrand or rename noted. ClearPay Technologies Ltd. is the legal entity name as stated in the document.

Cash & Restricted Cash includes $6.2M in segregated client float accounts required under U.S. state money transmitter regulations; available operating cash of $32.2M is the liquidity figure net of restricted cash. Effective Take Rate is computed as Net Revenue divided by TPV, excluding Platform Access and Implementation Services revenue. Total Recognized Revenue is the sum of three revenue lines: Net Revenue (take-rate based), Platform Access Revenue, and Implementation Services Revenue — verbatim total used as recognized_revenue. No ARR, NDR, logo churn, EBITDA, or monthly net burn metrics were present in the document.
No rebrand or corporate identity change mentioned. Company is ConstructIQ Solutions Inc. throughout the document.

Loan yields are presented at sector level for the first time in Q1 2025 as part of a refreshed portfolio monitoring framework. Credit Loss Rate is on a last-twelve-months (LTM) basis, net of recoveries. Operating margin metrics (Pre-Provision / Adjusted) are under review and not reported this period. No canonical EBITDA, ARR, NDR, logo churn, cash balance, or monthly net burn metrics were present in the document.
No rebrand or corporate identity change mentioned. Company is referred to consistently as "LendBridge Capital Corp." throughout the document.

1. Gross Margin (58%): Per footnote (3), defined as interest income net of cost of funds only — not a standard gross margin calculation inclusive of all direct costs. 2. Pre-Provision Operating Margin (29%): Mapped to EBITDA as the closest available profitability metric; per footnote (2), excludes loan loss provisions and non-recurring items — not a standard EBITDA definition. 3. Net Charge-off Rate (4.2%): LTM basis per footnote (1); includes write-offs net of recoveries. Not mapped to any canonical metric (no logo_churn or NDR equivalent for a lending business). 4. Recognized Revenue ($10.1M): For a specialty finance platform, revenue composition includes interest income, origination fees, and ancillary treasury services; the $0.7M 'Fee & Other Income' line appears separately, creating some ambiguity about whether $10.1M is a subtotal or all-in figure.
No rebrand or rename noted. The entity is referred to as "LendBridge Capital Corp." throughout.

(1) Net Charge-off Rate (LTM) is equivalent to 'Credit Loss Rate' used in Q3–Q4 2024; reported on a last-twelve-months basis — not extracted as it does not map to a canonical metric.
(2) Pre-Provision Operating Margin reinstated per updated board reporting policy; equivalent to 'Adjusted Operating Margin' in Q3 2024 — not extracted as it does not map to a canonical metric.
(3) Provision Coverage Ratio = total loan loss reserves / LTM net charge-offs; introduced Q2 2025 — not extracted as it does not map to a canonical metric.
(4) Gross Margin reflects interest income net of cost of funds; excludes provisions and operating expenses.

Adjusted Operating Margin (31% in Q3 2024) was relabelled from 'Pre-Provision Operating Margin' to align with internal management reporting conventions adopted in Q3 2024. It excludes loan loss provisions and non-recurring items. This metric is not among the canonical metrics and was not extracted.
